entities.name: GREEN GOLD PLUS
entities.description: A foliar application containing amino acids, organic matter, and micronutrients including N, Cu, Mn, Mg, Fe, Zn, and B

entities.name: PATANCHERU, ANDHRA PRADESH
entities.description: The location where the field trial was conducted

entities.description: The specific season during which the field trial was conducted

entities.name: POD YIELD
entities.description: The yield of pods in groundnuts, which increased by 26% with Green Gold Plus

entities.name: HAULM YIELD
entities.description: The yield of haulms in groundnuts, which increased by 24% with Green Gold Plus

entities.name: SEED YIELD
entities.description: The yield of seeds in groundnuts, which increased by 35% with Green Gold Plus

entities.name: FOLIAR APPLICATION
